info.title: KidneyHood Patient Outcome Prediction API
info.description:
API for the KidneyHood.org patient outcome prediction application. Enables patients to enter kidney health lab values, view eGFR trajectory predictions, and manage their accounts via magic link authentication.

Key architectural decisions:
- No BFF — frontend calls API directly (Decision #7)
- Magic link auth only — no passwords (Decision #1)
- PDF export deferred to Phase 2b
- Guest data stored server-side with httpOnly cookie, 24hr TTL (Decision #4)
- Predictions are compute-on-demand, never stored (Decision #10)
- Audit log uses ON DELETE SET NULL for user_id (Decision #14)

x-cors-policy.description: CORS configuration for direct frontend-to-API communication (no BFF, Decision #7)
x-cors-policy.notes: allow_credentials is required for httpOnly session_token cookie (guest sessions). Preflight caching set to 1 hour.

post.description: Sends a magic link to the provided email address. If no account exists, one is created automatically. Rate limited to 3 requests per email per 15 minutes.

200.description: Magic link sent successfully. Response is identical whether the email exists or not (prevents email enumeration).

example.message: If an account exists for this email, a magic link has been sent.

error.message: Invalid request data

details.message: Must be a valid email address

error.message: Too many magic link requests. Please try again later.

post.summary: Verify magic link token and create session
post.description: Validates the token from the magic link email. Returns a JWT access token and refresh token. Tokens are single-use and expire after 15 minutes. If a guest session_token cookie is present, guest data is migrated to the authenticated account.

Set-Cookie.description: Clears guest session_token cookie if present

401.description: Token is invalid, expired, or already used

error.message: This magic link has expired or has already been used.

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token pair. The old refresh token is invalidated (rotation).

401.description: Refresh token is invalid or expired

error.message: Refresh token is invalid or has been revoked.

post.description: Revokes the current access token and its associated refresh token. Client should discard stored tokens.

error.message: Authentication required.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

error.message: Authentication required.

delete.summary: Delete account and all associated data
delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account, all lab entries, and magic link tokens. Audit log entries are retained with user_id set to NULL (ON DELETE SET NULL per Decision #14). This action is irreversible. HIPAA: fulfills the right to delete.

200.description: Account and data deleted. Audit records retained with NULL user_id.

example.message: Your account and all associated data have been permanently deleted.

error.message: Authentication required.

post.description: Creates a new lab entry for the authenticated user. Each entry represents a single visit date. Fields are validated against clinical ranges. The server computes egfr_calculated from creatinine, age_at_visit, and sex using the CKD-EPI 2021 formula unless egfr_override is provided.

400.description: Validation error — one or more fields out of range or missing

error.message: One or more fields failed validation.

details.message: BUN must be between 5 and 150 mg/dL.
Creatinine must be between 0.3 and 15.0 mg/dL.

error.message: Authentication required.

422.description: Unprocessable entity — structurally valid JSON but semantically invalid

error.message: Request body could not be processed.

details.message: Visit date cannot be in the future.

get.summary: List all lab entries for the current user
get.description: Returns all lab entries for the authenticated user, ordered by visit_date descending (most recent first). Supports optional pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to return

error.message: Authentication required.

get.description: Returns a single lab entry by ID. The entry must belong to the authenticated user.

error.message: Authentication required.

404.description: Lab entry not found or does not belong to user

error.message: Lab entry not found.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a lab entry. The entry must belong to the authenticated user. The associated audit log record is retained with user_id preserved (the lab entry deletion itself is logged; the audit record's user_id uses ON DELETE SET NULL only when the user account is deleted, per Decision #14).

error.message: Authentication required.

404.description: Lab entry not found or does not belong to user

error.message: Lab entry not found.

post.description:
Computes eGFR trajectory predictions. Supports two modes:

**Authenticated users:** Provide `lab_entry_ids` referencing stored lab entries. The server reads all referenced entries and runs the prediction engine.

**Guests:** Provide `lab_entries` array with inline lab data. Guest data is stored server-side in a session with 24hr TTL (httpOnly cookie, Decision #4). The guest session_token is read from the cookie automatically.

The prediction engine returns 4 trajectory lines (none, bun24, bun17, bun12), each with 15 data points at months [0, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24, 36, 48, 60, 72, 84, 96, 108, 120]. Results are NOT stored (compute-on-demand, Decision #10).

Confidence tiers:
- Tier 1: Required fields only (BUN, creatinine, potassium, age, sex)
- Tier 2: Tier 1 + BOTH hemoglobin AND glucose (Decision #12)
- Tier 3: Tier 2 + 3 or more visits with lab entries

Rate limited: 10 requests per minute for guests, 30 for authenticated users.

Set-Cookie.description: Sets session_token httpOnly cookie for guest users (24hr TTL). Not present for authenticated users.

value.unlock_prompt: Add hemoglobin and glucose results to sharpen your estimate.
Add 2 more visit dates to unlock trend analysis.

400.description: Validation error on inline lab data

error.message: One or more fields failed validation.

details.message: BUN must be between 5 and 150 mg/dL.
Sex is required. Must be one of: male, female, unknown.

401.description: lab_entry_ids provided but user is not authenticated

error.message: Authentication required to use stored lab entries.

404.description: One or more lab_entry_ids not found

error.message: One or more lab entries were not found.

422.description: Request is structurally valid but cannot be processed (e.g., must provide either lab_entry_ids or lab_entries, not both)

error.message: Provide either lab_entry_ids (authenticated) or lab_entries (guest), not both.
Too many prediction requests. Please try again later.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

get.description: Returns service health status including database connectivity.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /auth/verify or POST /auth/refresh. Include as: Authorization: Bearer {token}

GuestSession.name: session_token
GuestSession.description: httpOnly cookie containing the guest session token. Set automatically by the server on first guest prediction. 24hr TTL (Decision #4). Full HIPAA protections apply to guest session data.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Number of requests remaining in the current rate limit window

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit window resets (only present when rate limited or approaching limit)

email.description: Patient's email address. Account is auto-created if it does not exist.

expires_in.description: Magic link TTL in seconds (default 900 = 15 minutes)

token.description: The magic link token from the email URL

refresh_token.description: The refresh token from a previous auth response

access_token.description: JWT access token. Include in Authorization header for authenticated requests.

refresh_token.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens. Single-use (rotation).

expires_in.description: Access token TTL in seconds (default 3600 = 1 hour)

guest_data_migrated.description: True if guest session data was migrated to the authenticated account during this verification

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in ISO 8601 format

sex.description: Biological sex for eGFR calculation (Decision #3). Null until profile is completed.

lab_entry_count.description: Total number of stored lab entries for this user

SexEnum.description: Biological sex. Required for eGFR calculation (CKD-EPI 2021 formula). Decision #3: required field with three allowed values.

LabEntryBase.description: Base lab entry fields shared between create, stored, and inline schemas.

visit_date.description: Date of the lab visit in ISO 8601 format. Cannot be in the future.

age_at_visit.description: Patient age at the time of the lab visit

hemoglobin.description: Hemoglobin in g/dL. Optional. Required (along with glucose) for Tier 2 confidence (Decision #12).

glucose.description: Fasting glucose in mg/dL. Optional. Required (along with hemoglobin) for Tier 2 confidence (Decision #12).

egfr_override.description: Patient-provided eGFR value. If provided, used instead of the CKD-EPI calculation.

uric_acid.description: Serum uric acid in mg/dL. Optional.

bp_systolic.description: Systolic blood pressure in mmHg. Optional.

bp_diastolic.description: Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg. Optional.

bp_on_medication.description: Whether BP reading is while on blood pressure medication. Optional.

upcr_unit.description: Unit for UPCR measurement. Required if upcr is provided.

LabEntryCreate.description: Request body for creating a new lab entry. Extends LabEntryBase with no additional fields.

InlineLabEntry.description: Inline lab entry data for guest predictions. Same validation rules as LabEntryCreate.

LabEntry.description: Stored lab entry returned from the API. Includes server-generated fields.

egfr_calculated.description: Server-calculated eGFR from CKD-EPI 2021 formula using creatinine, age_at_visit, and sex.

total.description: Total number of lab entries for this user

PredictRequest.description: Prediction request. Provide EITHER lab_entry_ids (authenticated users) OR lab_entries (guests), never both.

lab_entry_ids.description: UUIDs of stored lab entries (for authenticated users). Server reads these entries and runs prediction.

lab_entries.description: Inline lab entry data (for guests). Data is stored in server-side session with 24hr TTL (Decision #4).

TrajectoryData.description: Four trajectory arrays, each containing 15 eGFR values at the time points specified in time_points_months.

none.description: Trajectory with no BUN intervention (current path)

bun12.description: Trajectory with BUN target <=12 mg/dL (most aggressive intervention)

DialAges.description: Predicted age at which eGFR reaches the dialysis threshold (12 mL/min/1.73m2) for each trajectory. Null if eGFR does not reach dialysis threshold within 10 years.

egfr_calculated.description: Current eGFR computed from the most recent lab entry using CKD-EPI 2021. If egfr_override was provided, this reflects the override value.

confidence_tier.description: Prediction confidence tier. 1=required fields only. 2=Tier 1 + BOTH hemoglobin AND glucose (Decision #12). 3=Tier 2 + 3 or more visits.

unlock_prompt.description: User-facing message suggesting how to improve confidence. Null at Tier 3.

time_points_months.description: Fixed array of month offsets from current date: [0, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24, 36, 48, 60, 72, 84, 96, 108, 120]

slope.description: eGFR slope (mL/min/1.73m2 per year) calculated from 3+ visits. Negative = declining. Null if fewer than 3 visits.

slope_description.description: Human-readable slope category. Null if slope is null.

visit_count.description: Number of lab entries used in this prediction

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the prediction was computed

details.description: Field-level error details. Empty array for non-validation errors.

field.description: The field path that caused the error (e.g., 'bun', 'lab_entries[0].creatinine')

message.description: Human-readable error message for this field
